name: Braised Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the green part of the scallion into 2-inch pieces.
2. Combine all ingredients except meat, oil, and chicken stock in a bowl and set aside.
3. Heat the peanut oil in a heavy skillet over medium heat. Brown the beef on all sides quickly.
4. Add the mixture from the bowl to the skillet and cook, stirring to heat and blend, about 3 minutes.
5. Pour in the chicken stock and add the remaining ingredients (soy sauce). Bring to a simmer.
6. Cover and simmer for 90 minutes to 2 hours or until the meat is tender.
7. Slice the meat and serve hot or cold. Reserve the gravy as master sauce.
8. Strain through cheesecloth when cool, refrigerate in a covered dish.
